_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.
_publications._context: ER+ MCF7 human adenocarcinoma cell line. We targeted NF1's RASGAP GRD domain with clustered regularly interspaced short palindromic repeat (CRISPR) | CUTLL1 was used as positive controls for NOTCH1, MDA-MB-231 for NOTCH1, NOTCH2, and NOTCH4, and MCF7 for HES1 and NOTCH3

_publications._publicationTitle: Multiomic analyses reveal new targets of polycomb repressor complex 2 in Schwann lineage cells and malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.
